_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to apply programming language structures (e.g., source code review) and logic.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and problems that can be solved more simply and reliably with rule-based logic or statistical methods.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-001 (TF, cosine: 0.488), TF-K-002 (TF, cosine: 0.457).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.465). Shared vocabulary: [ability, logic]. DCWF-only terms [apply, code, language, programming, review, source] vs WIDAI-only terms [based, distinguish, learning, machine, methods, more] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.866, R=0.859). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Ability to apply programming language structures (e.g., source code review) and" and "Ability to distinguish between problems that require machine learning and proble" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.495 ≈ STS 0.465 (gap 0.030). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability, logic] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [ability, logic]. DCWF-only: [apply, code, language, programming, review, source]. WIDAI-only: [based, distinguish, learning, machine, methods, more].
